con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="CourseblockService" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/Imports"> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd0" namespace="http://tempuri.org/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd3" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblockNames_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblockNames"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblockNames_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblockNamesResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblocksInVolume_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblocksInVolume"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblocksInVolume_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblocksInVolumeResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblock_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblock"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetCourseblock_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCourseblockResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyleaderCourseAssociationsResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodesResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumesResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="ICourseblockService"> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblockNames"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblockNames" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblockNames_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblockNamesResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblockNames_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblocksInVolume"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblocksInVolume" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblocksInVolume_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblocksInVolumeResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblocksInVolume_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblock"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblock" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblock_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblockResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetCourseblock_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyleaderCourseAssociationsResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodesResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumesResponse" message="tns:ICourseblockService_GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpBinding_ICourseblockService" type="tns:ICourseblockService"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblockNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblockNames" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblocksInVolume"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblocksInVolume" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetCourseblock"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetCourseblock" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/ICourseblockService/GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="CourseblockService"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpBinding_ICourseblockService" binding="tns:BasicHttpBinding_ICourseblockService"> <soap:address location="https://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd3" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:element name="GetCourseblockNames"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="courseCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetCourseblockNamesResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetCourseblockNamesResult" nillable="true" type="q1:ArrayOfCourseblock" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetCourseblocksInVolume"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetCourseblocksInVolumeResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetCourseblocksInVolumeResult" nillable="true" type="q2:ArrayOfCourseblock" xmlns:q2="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetCourseblock"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetCourseblockResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetCourseblockResult" nillable="true" type="q3:ArrayOfstring" xmlns:q3="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyleaderCourseAssociations"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyleaderCourseAssociationsResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetStudyleaderCourseAssociationsResult" nillable="true" type="q4:ArrayOfStudyleaderCourseAssociation" xmlns:q4="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodes"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="courseCodes" nillable="true" type="q5:ArrayOfstring" xmlns:q5="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodesResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumeAndCourseCodesResult" nillable="true" type="q6:ArrayOfStudyBoxInfo" xmlns:q6="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumes"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volumes" nillable="true" type="q7:ArrayOfint" xmlns:q7="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumesResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetStudyBoxInfoByVolumesResult" nillable="true" type="q8:ArrayOfStudyBoxInfo" xmlns:q8="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Studybase.CourseblockService"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/CourseBlokService/CourseblockService.svc?xsd=xsd3" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfCourseblock"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Courseblock" nillable="true" type="tns:Courseblock"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfCourseblock" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfCourseblock"/> <xs:complexType name="Courseblock"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Courseblock" nillable="true" type="tns:Courseblock"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfStudyleaderCourseAssociation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="StudyleaderCourseAssociation" nillable="true" type="tns:StudyleaderCourseAssociation"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfStudyleaderCourseAssociation" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfStudyleaderCourseAssociation"/> <xs:complexType name="StudyleaderCourseAssociation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CourseCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MatrikelId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="StadsCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="StudyleaderCourseAssociation" nillable="true" type="tns:StudyleaderCourseAssociation"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfStudyBoxInfo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="StudyBoxInfo" nillable="true" type="tns:StudyBoxInfo"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfStudyBoxInfo" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfStudyBoxInfo"/> <xs:complexType name="StudyBoxInfo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CourseCodes" nillable="true" type="q1:ArrayOfstring" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Danish" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="English" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Shown" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="StudyBoxInfo" nillable="true" type="tns:StudyBoxInfo"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfstring"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfstring" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfstring"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfint"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="int" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfint" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfint"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema>
